2. **Put the Thurnos folder under git — carefully.** This has been the #2 priority for 3 mornings in a row. Before any first push, add a `.gitignore` at `~/Documents/ThurrSolutions/Thurnos/` that excludes `memory/n8n_api_key.txt` (or the whole `memory/` directory). The JWT in that file is live — committing it to GitHub would leak it. Runbook is in `logs/github_backup_2026-04-16.md`.

3. **Seed at least one real file into a client folder.** Today is **day 4** with all 5 client subfolders (`Notes/`, `Contracts/`, `Deliverables/`, `Invoices/`) empty across RestoreContracting, 5StarHospice, Andy Life Insurance, Christy Nail Business, Chic-Fil-A. Until something real lives on disk — a contract PDF, a scope doc, a deadline note — these briefings will keep repeating the same empty-state warning. Lowest-friction first step: drop a single `Notes/status.md` into whichever client is most active right now.
